target:
# The page load worked but CDX returns empty. Let me try fetching the actual screenshots page
# using the working method (--resolve) and parse image tags
curl -sk --max-time 30 --resolve "web.archive.org:443:207.241.237.3" "https://web.archive.org/web/20051116230753/http://www.empirepoker.com/" 2>&1 | grep -i "screenshot\|screen\|img\|table\|client\|lobby" | grep -v "^<script\|^<link\|^<style" | head -40
